scenario:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=1 To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1540920438 2 IN IP4 172.27.0.15 s=- c=IN IP4 172.27.0.130 b=AS:64 t=0 0 m=audio 2688 RTP/AVP 0 101 c=IN IP4 172.27.0.130 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20
ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=1 To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=2 Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1540920438 3 IN IP4 172.27.0.15 s=- c=IN IP4 172.27.0.121 b=AS:64 t=0 0 m=audio 2576 RTP/AVP 0 101 c=IN IP4 172.27.0.121 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000
ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> CSeq: 2 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
-->
